description:
GIVEN a user is logged into the MLB app on a Samsung TV
AND the user is able to access the Accessibility Settings in the TV Settings

steps.action:
WHEN a user updates the following accessibility settings:
- Font
- Foreground color
- Background color
- Window color
- Edge type
- Edge color
AND the user turns CC ON
AND the user initiates playback of CC available content (ex: games, MLBN feed)
steps.result: THEN CC displays in the selected Font, Foreground, Background and Window color, Edge type and Edge color
